org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view

Interface ViewComponentPropertyChangeListener

  • All Superinterfaces:
    EventListener
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractFigurePropertyPanel, AbstractModelPropertyPanel, FigureView.EventHandler, PolylinePropertyPanel, StatePropertyPanel, TextPropertyPanel, TransitionPropertyPanel

    public interface ViewComponentPropertyChangeListener
extends EventListener
    Event of a change in the view component.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
